title: agrostis tuvinica
intro: Agrostis tuvinica, also known as Tuvinian bentgrass, is a species of grass that is native to the mountainous regions of Tuva, a Russian republic in Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Agrostis tuvinica has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including stomach problems, fever, and respiratory infections, with its health benefits attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
